title: Lanai
description: A bundle of QoL and performance enhancements for vanilla+ gameplay with sane default configs.
body:
![Lanai Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc5c881cb99964f9780a1aa372abf09ea3d09361.png) A bundle of QoL and performance enhancements for vanilla+ gameplay with sane default configs.
# Lanai Lanai is bundle of quality of life and performance enhancements for vanilla+ gameplay with sane (in my opinion) default configurations built on [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline). Jump right into gameplay instead of spending half your time in a configuration menu! Optimized for the use of voice channels during gameplay. _This modpack was created so that players of a private server can receive automatic updates to the recommended experience, but anyone who appreciates unobtrusive enhancements out of the box may benefit. This pack should be maintained for the forseeable future._ ## 📥 Installation The recommended method of downloading, installing, and updating this modpack is to do so through the [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app). - Set your Java memory (Settings gear > Java settings > Java memory) to at least `4096` mb, although slightly higher is better. - Shaders are included but disabled by default to assist low end systems. Press `k` in-game to toggle shaders. ## ✨ Out of the Box Configuration The following notable options are applied out of the box in addition to those included with Adrenaline:
Vanilla Options - The Mojang logo appears in dark mode by default. - Accessibility onboarding is disabled by default. - The "Caution: Third-Party Online Play" screen is disabled by default. - Realms notifications are disabled by default. - The social interactions hint is disabled by default. - Tutorial steps are disabled by default. - Advanced item tooltips (showing durability) is enabled by default. - The brightness (gamma) is set to bright by default. - Music volume is set to zero by default. - Weather volume is set to 10% by default. - All other volumes are set to 25% by default (to optimize volume for voice channels). - The Lanai resource pack changes the title screen by default.
Mod Options - Iris Shaders - Complimentary Shaders are selected but not toggled by default. (Press `k` to toggle.) - Inventory Profiles Next - Allow some non enchanted items to break is enabled by default. - The visual notification for a failed replace is small to match the others by default. - Highlighting is disabled by default. - The configuration buttons are hidden from the inventory by default. - The profile switching UI is hidden from the inventory by default. - Jade 🔍 - Mod name is disabled by default. - Fluids are disabled by default. - Mod Menu - The Realms button is replaced by the mods button by default. - Update notifications and easter eggs are disabled where possible for all mods to prevent unexpected behavior.
## 📦 What's Included The following mods and shaders are included in addition to those included with Adrenaline:
Mods - [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) - [ClickThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough) - [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) - [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims) - [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - [Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves) - [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)
Shaders - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
## ❓ Getting Support If you are a member of the private server, please submit issues, feedback, and suggestions via Discord. Otherwise, this modpack is provided as-is. Please consult the documentation for each individual mod or your server operator. ## 💚 Support Creators If you find value in this pack, please consider supporting the creators of Adrenaline as well as the mods and shaders listed above.
